currentFocus: Docs/state now describe the failed-wave rescue integration: private Ghidra path redaction, ARM4 proof-plan/checker hardening, Lore pack fail-closed behavior, and bounded Asset Library path/accessibility improvements, with runtime/release/online non-claims preserved.

currentDocsTruth.docsGovernance: LOCAL_LAB_OVERLAY.md keeps exact private Ghidra project/store/backup locations out of tracked docs while preserving public overlay rules.
currentDocsTruth.rebuildProofPlan: The tmm-arm4-readiness-gate proof-plan/checker is public-safe continuity evidence only. It is not readiness-gate execution, command arming, importer execution, generated payload output, private asset read, runtime proof, visual/gameplay proof, rebuild parity, runtime parity, or no-noticeable-difference parity.
currentDocsTruth.lorePackIntegrity: Lore pack builder/check tooling owns relativePath index/content equality today. AppCore content-pack loading validates unsafe loaded paths, duplicate ids/paths, hash mismatch, incomplete/empty pack signals, malformed generated ids, and stale-pack retention boundaries with generic error text for row-controlled values.
currentDocsTruth.assetLibraryUx: Asset Library passive material-package status summarizes the output root and keeps explicit Open/Copy full-path actions. Source tests guard one polite live region on the Asset Library page; this is not runtime screen-reader proof.
currentDocsTruth.patchBenchReceiptBehavior: PatchBenchSafeCopyReceiptText remains an unwired primitive receipt formatter scaffold. BinaryPatchesPage still owns live receipt projection, File/Path/I/O, launch planning, process control, patch/catalog semantics, Host/Join fallback, online boundaries, and runtime-proof boundaries.
currentDocsTruth.claimBoundary: No AppCore receipt construction, launch argument behavior, safe-copy planning, process control, patch catalog row, byte patch, Host/Join availability, online readiness, runtime proof, release/publication, gameplay, visual parity, rebuild parity, no-noticeable-difference parity, Ghidra mutation, hard payload, installed-game, or original-BEA mutation claim changed.

validation.expectation: Final integration closeout must run the serial docs/repo/payload, RE, Lore, WinUI, and state JSON gates on the integrated tree before push.
validation.latestIntegration: Pending final serial closeout evidence after this state refresh.
